note: Mainnet Balancer V3 pool universe. Users add/remove liquidity through the single V3 Router (0xAE563E3f8219521950555F5962419C8919758Ea2); the per-pool token list (needed to decode addLiquidityProportional/Unbalanced & removeLiquidityProportional, whose calldata carries amounts[] but not token addresses) is baked here and surfaced to those manifests via $source.pool_tokens (balancer_v3:pool_tokens resolver). Pools are disposition=exclude from the CALLKEY universe (the pool address is not a direct user-facing callkey target); their liquidity operations ARE covered via the Router manifests + this baked map. GYROE dominates real liquidity volume (38/40 top active pools) so the full universe is baked rather than TVL-scoped (the API cannot USD-price many pool tokens, making TVL filtering unreliable).

source.name: Balancer V3 official API
source.query: poolGetPools(where:{chainIn:[MAINNET],protocolVersionIn:[3]}) { address protocolVersion type poolTokens{address} } paginated first:1000
